## Scope check

This plugin's scope is **image generation only**. Please confirm:

- [ ] My request is about image generation, editing, or related diagnostic.
- [ ] If it would expose another Codex built-in tool (`web_search`, `browser`, etc.), I understand a separate plugin is preferred over widening this one.
